FilterData Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The FilterData type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ColumnName
For comparison filters, sets the comparison column name.
CompareOp
For comparison filters, sets the comparison operator. Equality comparison will be assumed when this property is not set.
Expression
Gets or sets the filter expression data.
Type
Represents the filter type. If this property is not set, the type will be set to Expression if the Expression property is set; otherwise, if will be set to Compare.
Value1
Gets or sets the comparison value.
Value2
Gets or sets the second comparison value for range comparisons.
Values
Gets or sets the value list to compare against a set of values.
Top
See Also

Reference

FilterData Class
QBM.CompositionApi.Dto Namespace
